text:
To determine whether the Contract and Plan IDs in the data file for the reference year (year of the 
data file) represent the same plan in the prior year, compare this variable (along with the 
corresponding CONTRACT_ID_11) to the PLAN_ID_12 (and CONTRACT_ID_12). 

Prior to 2015, this variable was always encrypted to comply with CMS privacy rules. 

You need to know both the Part D contract number (variable called CONTRACT_ID_YY) and plan 
benefit package identifier in order to identify the
